scripts.validate:quick: cd frontend && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && mkdir -p src-tauri/binaries && touch src-tauri/binaries/chronicler-backend-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2) && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cd ../backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app && .venv/bin/pyright app && .venv/bin/pytest
